missing_weight_for_extension: What weight should replace the marked `?` on the right spring?
The two springs are identical. What integer weight belongs at the marked `?` on the right spring?
Use the reference spring and the shown right-side extension. What weight should the red `?` mark have?

missing_extension_for_weight: What extension should replace the marked `?` on the right spring?

Determine the missing right-side extension from the identical-spring diagram.
spring_extension_difference: What is the absolute difference between the two shown spring extensions?
Using the two ruler markers, what integer difference in extension do the springs show?
How many extension units apart are the two shown spring markers?
Read the two spring-extension markers. What is their absolute difference?
Determine the difference in extension between the two identical springs.

task:spring_missing_value_query.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object with keys "reference_weight", "reference_extension", "query_weight", and "query_extension"; each value is a [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box around the corresponding weight block or extension marker
task:spring_missing_value_query.answer_hint: set "answer" to the integer missing weight or extension value

task:spring_extension_difference_query.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel boxes around the two extension markers being compared
task:spring_extension_difference_query.answer_hint: set "answer" to the integer extension difference
